## Affected Artifacts

<!-- Which architectural documents are affected? Check all that apply -->

- [ ] PRODUCT_CONSTITUTION.md
- [ ] DECISION_FREEZE.md

- [ ] Domain_Model_Board_Governance_V1.pdf

- [ ] IMPLEMENTATION_RULES.md
- [ ] IMPLEMENTATION_ROADMAP.md

## Nature of the Issue

- [ ] **Contradiction** — two artifacts conflict with each other
- [ ] **Gap** — an artifact does not specify something needed for implementation
- [ ] **Ambiguity** — an artifact can be interpreted in multiple ways
- [ ] **Infeasibility** — the specified design cannot be implemented as described
- [ ] **Performance** — the specified design has performance implications not anticipated
- [ ] **Security** — the specified design has security implications not anticipated

<!-- Explain the issue in detail. Reference specific sections, paragraphs, or rules in the affected artifacts -->

<!-- Per IMPLEMENTATION_RULES.md §Handling Architectural Issues, propose options for resolution -->

### Option A

<!-- Description, pros, cons -->

### Option B

<!-- Description, pros, cons -->

### Recommended Option

<!-- Which option do you recommend and why? -->

## Impact Assessment

- [ ] This issue blocks current implementation
- [ ] This issue can be worked around temporarily
- [ ] This issue affects future milestones

## Governance Action Required

> **Per IMPLEMENTATION_RULES.md:** Implementation is paused on the affected task until this issue is resolved through Governance Review and Founder approval. Do not implement speculative fixes.

---

*This issue follows the Handling Architectural Issues protocol defined in IMPLEMENTATION_RULES.md:*
1. *Stop implementation ✓*
2. *Document the issue ✓ (this issue)*
3. *Reference affected artifacts ✓*
4. *Propose options ✓*
5. *Submit for Governance Review — pending*
6. *Await Founder approval — pending*
